scripts.monitor:call: powershell -NoProfile -Command "while ($true) { $call = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:4000/api/calls/2ce4fd30-0908-4b7c-a465-77d89fb4edb7' -Method Get -Headers @{ 'x-tenant-id' = 'lexus-demo' }; $duration = if ($null -ne $call.data.durationSec) { $call.data.durationSec } else { 'N/A' }; $state = if ($call.data.state) { $call.data.state } else { $call.data.status }; Write-Host "$(Get-Date): $state - Duration: $duration" -ForegroundColor Yellow; Start-Sleep 5 }"
